description_long: This street light features a tall, slender cylindrical metal pole with a smooth, unadorned surface, supporting a single, modern lamp head at the top. The lamp head is rectangular with a slightly angled, flat cover, and is mounted on a short horizontal arm extending from the pole. The fixture is designed for efficient, downward illumination, typical of contemporary urban and suburban environments. The pole appears to be constructed from galvanized steel or aluminum, providing durability and resistance to weather. The lamp head is likely made of metal and polycarbonate or glass, with no visible decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and minimalism over ornamentation.
description: A tall, plain metal street light with a single, modern rectangular lamp head mounted on a short arm, designed for downward illumination.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the pole and the lamp head extending horizontally from the top.
description_view_1: Front view with the lamp head visible at the top, showing the arm and fixture directly facing the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the lamp head extending in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole and the back of the lamp head, with minimal detail on the fixture.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern rectangular lamp head with a flat, slightly angled cover and no decorative elements; likely features a protective diffuser or lens.
